name: dotnet-testing-advanced-aspnet-integration-testing
description: ASP.NET Core 整合測試的專門技能。當需要測試 Web API 端點、HTTP 請求/回應、中介軟體、依賴注入時使用。涵蓋 WebApplicationFactory、TestServer、HttpClient 測試、記憶體資料庫配置等。 Keywords: integration testing, 整合測試, web api testing, WebApplicationFactory, TestServer, HttpClient testing, controller testing, endpoint testing, 端點測試, RESTful API testing, Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing, CreateClient, ConfigureWebHost, AwesomeAssertions.Web, Be200Ok, Be404NotFound, middleware testing, 中介軟體測試, dependency injection testing
